raw.message: Defend the Tower and Defeat the Enemy!

hook.summary: A cat meme overlaying intense space shooter gameplay with a caption about losing.
hook.visual_action: A cat's face is superimposed over a busy space-themed tower defense game while the background shows chaotic combat.
hook.text_overlay: How i feel when i lose on level 67

scene_flow: Cat meme overlay appears over space shooter gameplay with a caption about losing.
Background gameplay shows intense combat with multiple projectiles and enemy ships.
Operatic music builds tension as the cat's face remains fixed on the screen.
The game UI shows resource accumulation and level progress while the meme persists.
on_screen_text: How i feel when i lose on level 67
audience_proxy: Younger male gamers who enjoy idle or tower defense games and relate to internet meme culture.
